summary: GTO Reference Dataset exposes a typed read API that Walkthrough Mode uses to enumerate the curated library, fetch a hand's spot data, fetch its GTO frequency mix, and resolve glossary concepts referenced from explanation text.

list_curated_hands.name: listCuratedHands
list_curated_hands.CuratedHandSummary_shape: { hand_id: string, title: string, lesson_tag: string, position: string, street: 'preflop'|'flop'|'turn'|'river' }
list_curated_hands.purpose: Walkthrough renders the index from this list.

get_curated_hand.name: getCuratedHand
get_curated_hand.CuratedHandFull_shape: { hand_id, title, lesson_tag, hero_position, hero_cards: [Card, Card], board: Card[], action_history: ActionEvent[], pot: number, hero_stack: number, available_actions: ActionOption[], gto_mix: { [action_name: string]: { frequency: number, sizing?: number } }, theory_explanation: { paragraphs: string[], concept_refs: string[] } }
get_curated_hand.purpose: Walkthrough renders the spot from the structural fields, hides gto_mix and theory_explanation until commit, then reveals them.

get_concept.name: getConcept
get_concept.shape: (concept_id: string) => { id: string, name: string, definition: string, related_hands: string[] }
get_concept.purpose: Walkthrough resolves concept_refs in theory_explanation to glossary entries.

score_decision.name: scoreDecision
score_decision.shape: (hand_id: string, user_action: string, user_sizing?: number) => { score_label: 'matches GTO mix' | 'partial' | 'off-tree', deviation_score: number }
score_decision.purpose: Walkthrough calls this after user commits to compute the score it shows in the reveal panel and emits in DecisionResult.

data_passed_not_logic: Section-2 returns pure data structures. Walkthrough never mutates them and never authors content; section-2 never renders UI.

section-2_owns: dataset content, glossary content, scoring algorithm against gto_mix
section-3_owns: all walkthrough UI, decision capture, commit-gate enforcement

test_seam: Unit test: listCuratedHands().length >= 20; getCuratedHand(id) returns a fully-populated record for every id; scoreDecision returns 'matches GTO mix' for any action whose gto_mix frequency is > 0.5.
